'''Alexis Cov-Prim''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Holovid/Legends|holovid]] star who played in ''[[The Empire and the Glory]]'', ''[[Marked by a Hunter]]'', and ''[[A New Order]]'', among others. Alexis's agent was [[Malthorn]], a part-time [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]].<ref name="The Shard of Alderaan" />
